summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 7 warning, 7 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:184` — `git checkout HEAD -- .` does not remove untracked new files; if the agent creates files without committing and the gate fails, those files persist in the working tree. Mitigated by: (a) role spec instructs commit-or-nothing, (b) worktree is force-removed in `finally` at `run.mjs:1549` regardless. Risk low but semantically incomplete. Add `git clean -fd` after `git checkout HEAD -- .` to also remove untracked files.

🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:390` — The source-assertion regex only checks for `completed > 0`, not the `blocked === 0` clause. If that half of the guard is later removed, the test still passes, silently breaking the spec requirement that the pass only runs when no tasks are blocked. Fix: extend the regex to `/completed\s*>\s*0\s*&&\s*blocked\s*===\s*0/`.

🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:1578` — `phaseOrder` hardcodes `["brainstorm", "build", "review"]` at both the console breakdown (line 1578) and the progress-log summary (line 1604); `"simplify"` is absent from both. Simplify-pass token cost is silently excluded from per-phase reporting. File to backlog.

🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:390` — Source assertion only checks `/completed\s*>\s*0/`; the spec-critical `blocked === 0` clause is not covered. Removing it from `run.mjs:1503` would leave all tests green. Extend the regex to cover the full guard. (Carried from Tester run_2.)

🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:390 — Source assertion regex only checks `completed > 0`; removing `&& blocked === 0` from run.mjs:1503 breaks the spec without failing any test — extend regex to cover `blocked === 0`

🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:62` — File paths from `git diff --name-only` are embedded into the agent prompt without sanitization; Git allows filenames with newlines and control characters; strip them (`f.replace(/[\x00-\x1f\x7f]/g, "").trim()`) before embedding. Risk is low in single-developer repos but realistic when external contributors or submodules are involved — and the agent runs with `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` so any injected instruction executes with full permissions.
🔴 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:138` — `let callIndex = 0;` declared but never read or used; remove it

🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:386` — Test "only runs simplify pass when completed > 0" only asserts `completed > 0` in the guard regex; the actual guard at `run.mjs:1503` is `completed > 0 && blocked === 0` — extend or rename to document both conditions
